notes: Website assets are organized under public/assets/source-site by source page slug.
Local assets are organized under public/assets/local-source by project slug and only include published copies, not absolute local drive paths.
Supplemental visuals are not used automatically; review-only files must be manually approved before site use.

websiteAssetsFound.alt: Survey data included 120+ responses, evenly split by gender, ages 18-70+, and varied housing types. No correlation was found between gender and annoyance levels.
websiteAssetsFound.caption: Survey data included 120+ responses, evenly split by gender, ages 18-70+, and varied housing types. No correlation was found between gender and annoyance levels.

websiteAssetsFound.alt: Survey results show most experience foggy mirrors, with middle-aged individuals most affected and willing to spend more. However, 20% of college students also rated the issue 7/10 or higher, indicating it's not limited to middle-aged users.
websiteAssetsFound.caption: Survey results show most experience foggy mirrors, with middle-aged individuals most affected and willing to spend more. However, 20% of college students also rated the issue 7/10 or higher, indicating it's not limited to middle-aged users.
